metadata.name: Transfer Files Between Systems
metadata.description: Securely transfer files to and from remote systems by using SSH utilities
objectives: Copy files from a remote host to a directory on the local machine
Use sftp for interactive file transfers
Use scp for non-interactive file transfers
prerequisites: Access to servera and serverb machines

hosts.name: serverb
hosts.description: Source server with SSH configuration files

tasks.name: Verify serverbackup1 directory exists
tasks.description: The ~/serverbackup1 directory should exist on servera

tasks.name: Verify serverbackup2 directory exists
tasks.description: The ~/serverbackup2 directory should exist on servera

tasks.name: Verify ssh directory copied via sftp to serverbackup1
tasks.description: The /etc/ssh directory from serverb should be copied to serverbackup1
tasks.success_message: ssh directory exists in serverbackup1 (sftp transfer successful)
tasks.failure_message: ssh directory not found in serverbackup1
hints: Use sftp to copy: sftp root@serverb

tasks.name: Verify sshd_config file in serverbackup1
tasks.description: The sshd_config file should exist in the sftp backup
tasks.failure_message: sshd_config file not found in serverbackup1
hints: The sftp transfer should have copied sshd_config from serverb:/etc/ssh/

tasks.name: Verify ssh directory copied via scp to serverbackup2
tasks.description: The /etc/ssh directory from serverb should be copied to serverbackup2
tasks.success_message: ssh directory exists in serverbackup2 (scp transfer successful)
tasks.failure_message: ssh directory not found in serverbackup2
hints: Use scp to copy: scp -r root@serverb:/etc/ssh ~/serverbackup2

tasks.name: Verify sshd_config file in serverbackup2
tasks.description: The sshd_config file should exist in the scp backup
tasks.failure_message: sshd_config file not found in serverbackup2
hints: The scp transfer should have copied sshd_config from serverb:/etc/ssh/

tasks.name: Verify both backup directories have ssh_config files
tasks.description: Both serverbackup1 and serverbackup2 should have ssh_config copied
tasks.failure_message: One or both backups are missing ssh_config
